What Is A Customer
Captivation Offer?
Module 4 - Lesson 1
The 6FFF Customer Captivation Offer:

-- 2 of 5 --

It’s A Superior High-Value,
Low-Barrier Offer 	!
Designed To Attract Quality
Customers & Transform
Them Into Raving Fans
Module 4 - Lesson 1
The 6FFF Customer Captivation Offer:

-- 3 of 5 --

Elements Of A 6FFF Customer Captivation Offer:!
• Built On Your Hook & Promise!
• Narrow In Focus & Scope!
• $19-$29 Price Range 	!
• Offers A Lopsided Value Proposition!
• One (or more) High-Value Premiums/Bonuses!
• Superior Risk-Reversal Component
Module 4 - Lesson 1
The 6FFF Customer Captivation Offer:

-- 4 of 5 --

REMEMBER:!
The 	OFFER 	Is Second
Most-Important Element Of
Your Entire Marketing
Funnel
